name: PJO (with a twist)
description:
What if Luke had never joined Kronos? What if Percy wasn't part of the prophecy? It'd be a regular camp, but with demigods instead! So everything from the book series? Forget about it, it's just the characters relaxing on a beach :3

I have no clue how it'd work out, but just go with it

(PS: None of the characters added in HOO is gonna be in here)

(PPS: Rachel isn't going to be in here, neither is Thalia)

The art isn't mine, it's by spookedbees from tumblr!
creator: Pistashio_Paddingtion
